svg.metadata:
{"type":"flowgraph","mermaid":"graph LR
 CoverMd["_cover.md"] --> AppDataCover["AppData.Cover"]
 AppDataCover --> SplashView["Splash View"]
 CatalogJson["retold-catalog.json"] --> AppDataCatalog["AppData.Catalog"]
 AppDataCatalog -->|fallback| AppDataSidebarGroups["AppData.SidebarGroups"]
 CatalogJson --> AppDataSidebarGroups
 AppDataSidebarGroups --> SidebarView["Sidebar View"]
 SidebarMd["_sidebar.md (overrides if present)"] --> AppDataSidebarGroups
 KeywordIndex["retold-keyword-index.json"] --> LunrIndex["lunr Index"]
 LunrIndex -->|only if index is available| SearchView["Search View / Sidebar Search"]
","style":"notebook"}
